mapper.select: SELECT A.PROP_CD AS propCd, A.CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, A.RESV_NO AS resvNo, A.RESV_STAT AS resvStat, A.RESV_USER_NM AS resvUserNm, A.RM_NO AS rmNo, A.RM_TP_CD AS rmTpCd, A.ARR_DT AS arrDt, A.DEP_DT AS depDt, A.DEP_HOUR AS depHour, A.CHK_IN_HOUR AS chkInHour, A.CHK_OUT_HOUR AS chkOutHour, A.PER_NM AS perNm, A.PER_USE_LANG AS perUseLang, A.PER_ADULT_QTY AS perAdultQty, A.PER_CHILD_QTY AS perChildQty, A.PER_PASS_NO AS perPassNo, A.CAR_NO AS carNo, A.USE_YN AS useYn FROM PMS.PMS_RESERVATION A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND A.RESV_NO = #{resvNo} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT A.PROP_CD AS propCd, A.CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, A.RESV_NO AS resvNo, A.RESV_STAT AS resvStat, A.RM_NO AS rmNo, A.PER_NM AS perNm, A.PER_USE_LANG AS perUseLang, A.ARR_DT AS arrDt, A.DEP_DT AS depDt, A.CHK_IN_HOUR AS chkInHour FROM PMS.PMS_RESERVATION A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND A.RESV_STAT = 'I' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CHK_IN_HOUR DESC

SELECT A.PROP_CD AS propCd, A.CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, A.RESV_NO AS resvNo, A.RESV_STAT AS resvStat, A.RM_NO AS rmNo, A.PER_NM AS perNm, A.PER_USE_LANG AS perUseLang, A.ARR_DT AS arrDt, A.DEP_DT AS depDt, A.CHK_IN_HOUR AS chkInHour, A.CHK_OUT_HOUR AS chkOutHour FROM PMS.PMS_RESERVATION A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.RESV_NO DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT A.PROP_CD AS propCd, A.CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, A.RESV_NO AS resvNo, A.RESV_STAT AS resvStat, A.RM_NO AS rmNo, A.PER_NM AS perNm, A.PER_USE_LANG AS perUseLang, A.ARR_DT AS arrDt, A.DEP_DT AS depDt, A.CHK_IN_HOUR AS chkInHour FROM PMS.PMS_RESERVATION A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND A.RM_NO = #{rmNo} AND A.RESV_STAT IN ('I', 'R') AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CHK_IN_HOUR DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A.PROP_CD AS propCd, A.CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, A.CHECK_IN_TIME AS checkInTime, A.CHECK_IN_TIME_TO AS checkInTimeTo, A.CHECK_OUT_CLOSE_TIME AS checkOutCloseTime FROM PMS.PMS_COMPLEX_CONF_R A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd}

SELECT A.PROP_CD AS propCd, A.CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, A.CMPX_TP AS cmpxTp, A.CMPX_NM AS cmpxNm, A.CMPX_ZIP_CD AS cmpxZipCd, A.CMPX_ADDR AS cmpxAddr, A.CMPX_DTL_ADDR AS cmpxDtlAddr, A.CMPX_REPR_TEL AS cmpxReprTel, A.USE_YN AS useYn FROM PMS.PMS_COMPLEX A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd}

SELECT A.USER_ID AS userId, A.PROP_CD AS propCd, A.CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, A.USER_NM AS userNm, A.USER_PW AS userPw, A.USER_TP AS userTp, A.DEPT_CD AS deptCd, A.USER_LOCALE AS userLocale, A.USER_TEL_NO AS userTelNo, A.USER_EMAIL AS userEmail, A.USER_MOBILE AS userMobile, A.USER_WK_STAT AS userWkStat, A.USE_YN AS useYn FROM PMS.PMS_USER_MTR A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT A.PROP_CD AS propCd, A.PROP_SHRT_NM AS propShrtNm, A.PROP_FULL_NM AS propFullNm FROM PMS.PMS_PROPERTY A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT A.PROP_CD AS propCd, A.PROP_SHRT_NM AS propShrtNm, A.PROP_FULL_NM AS propFullNm FROM PMS.PMS_PROPERTY A WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.PROP_CD

SELECT A.PROP_CD AS propCd, A.CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, A.CMPX_NM AS cmpxNm, A.CMPX_REPR_USER_NM AS cmpxReprUserNm, A.CMPX_REPR_TEL AS cmpxReprTel FROM PMS.PMS_COMPLEX A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CMPX_CD
